slides.title: Why Join the UiPath Partner Success Program

cards.title: Recognized Delivery Expert
cards.body: Partner Success badge showcases proven excellence in delivery — demonstrating to customers that you are a trusted, top-performing UiPath partner.

cards.title: Partnership Alignment
cards.body: Subscribing to Partner Success demonstrates commitment to UiPath and unlocks exclusive go-to-market opportunities and qualified leads.

cards.title: Early Expert Advantage
cards.body: Gain early access to UiPath innovations and best practices, enabling your team on the latest technologies before the market.

slides.title: Delivery Assurance
slides.subtitle: Proactive support at every delivery stage

left.heading: What We Do
bullets: Review — assess infra, design, develop, test at any stage
Recommendations — observations with criticality: High / Med / Low
Retest — re-verify High findings to ensure resolution
Available for both Lightweight and Full Model subscribers

right.heading: Risk Coverage by Stage
bullets: Discovery — unclear scope, missing requirements → High
Design — poor architecture, non-standard approach → High
Develop — coding errors, non-standard practice → High
Test — defect leakage, insufficient coverage → Medium
Deploy — infra failures, security breaches → High

slides.title: Next Steps

bullets: All PSMs: complete Agentic ILT certification by end of Q2
Enablement team: schedule Agentic boot camp for enrolled partners — August 2026

Mihai: present expansion business case to CFO — June 25
